The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge on the Run (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $4,810,790Details
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,785,049
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,215,300
Total $3,000,349
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When SpongeBob’s beloved pet snail Gary goes missing, a path of clues leads SpongeBob and Patrick to the powerful King Poseidon, who has Gary held captive in the Lost City of Atlantic City. On their mission to save Gary, SpongeBob and his pals team up for a heroic and hilarious journey where they discover nothing is stronger than the power of friendship.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$865,824 (18.0% of total gross)
Legs:5.56 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:100.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$60,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:300 opening theaters/326 max. theaters, 8.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $6,267,650

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 14th, 2020 (Limited) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: July 31st, 2020 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
June 17th, 2021 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: March 4th, 2021 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for rude humor, some thematic elements, and mild language.
(Rating bulletin 2633 (Cert #52591), 6/10/2020)
Running Time: 91 minutes
Franchise: SpongeBob SquarePants
Plot point: Corporate Espionage, Gods and Goddesses, Missing Pet, Rescue, Restaurants, Road Trip
Release detail: Disrupted by 2020 COVID-19 pandemic
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Nickelodeon Films, Paramount Animation, United Plankton Pictures, Mikros Image Animation
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

When SpongeBob’s beloved pet snail Gary goes missing, a path of clues leads SpongeBob and Patrick to the powerful King Poseidon, who has Gary held captive in the Lost City of Atlantic City. On their mission to save Gary, SpongeBob and his pals team up for a heroic and hilarious journey where they discover nothing is stronger than the power of friendship.
